summary: Tested Analisi Pronta flow for Evolution PRO OS. Backend APIs work correctly (4/6 tests passed). CRITICAL BUG: Login response missing cliente_analisi fields (user_type, pagamento_analisi, analisi_generata, questionario_compilato) - prevents frontend from showing correct dashboard state.

critical.issue: Login response missing cliente_analisi specific fields: user_type, pagamento_analisi, analisi_generata, questionario_compilato. UserResponse model in auth.py needs to be updated.

integration_issues.issue: After login, cliente_analisi users are not routed to DashboardCliente because user_type is missing from login response

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/admin/clienti-analisi/{id}/salva-analisi - Returns email_sent field in response
✅ Backend: POST /api/admin/clienti-analisi/send-reminders - Works correctly (returns message about RESEND_API_KEY not configured)
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/clienti-analisi - Admin can view cliente with analisi_generata=true
✅ Frontend: DashboardCliente.jsx has correct 'Analisi pronta' state (STATO 3A) with title 'La tua Analisi Strategica è pronta'
✅ Frontend: DashboardCliente.jsx has 'Prenota la tua call strategica' button with data-testid='prenota-call-btn'
failed_tests: ❌ Backend: Login response missing user_type field - cliente_analisi users can't be identified
❌ Backend: Login response missing pagamento_analisi, analisi_generata, questionario_compilato fields
❌ Frontend: Cannot test DashboardCliente 'Analisi pronta' state because login doesn't return required fields
action_items: CRITICAL: Update UserResponse model in /app/backend/auth.py to include: user_type, pagamento_analisi, analisi_generata, questionario_compilato (all Optional)
CRITICAL: Update login method in AuthService to include these fields in the response for cliente_analisi users
Verify DashboardCliente shows correct state after login fix
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py UserResponse model (lines 51-59) missing cliente_analisi fields
auth.py login method (lines 217-231) doesn't include user_type, pagamento_analisi, analisi_generata, questionario_compilato in response
Email sending is MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY is empty, emails won't be sent but logic is implemented

success_rate.frontend: Cannot fully test - blocked by login response bug

seed_data_creation: Used existing test cliente att2_1773352332@test.com with analisi_generata=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login response bug blocks cliente dashboard testing. After fix, test: 1) Login as att2_1773352332@test.com, 2) Verify DashboardCliente shows 'La tua Analisi Strategica è pronta' title, 3) Verify 'Prenota la tua call strategica' button opens Calendly. The DashboardCliente.jsx component is correctly implemented - issue is in auth.py login response.

mocked_apis.Resend Email API: RESEND_API_KEY is empty - emails won't be sent but logic is implemented. salva-analisi returns email_sent=false

verified_features.salva_analisi_email_sent_response: WORKING - Returns email_sent field (false because RESEND_API_KEY empty)
verified_features.send_reminders_endpoint: WORKING - Returns message about RESEND_API_KEY not configured
verified_features.dashboard_cliente_analisi_pronta_state: CODE VERIFIED - Correctly shows 'La tua Analisi Strategica è pronta' when analisi_generata=true
verified_features.prenota_call_button: CODE VERIFIED - Button with data-testid='prenota-call-btn' opens Calendly link
verified_features.dashboard_in_preparazione_state: CODE VERIFIED - Shows 'Analisi in preparazione' when pagamento=true but analisi_generata=false

root_cause_analysis.issue: Cliente dashboard not showing 'Analisi pronta' state
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: Login endpoint (/api/auth/login) returns UserResponse model that doesn't include cliente_analisi specific fields (user_type, pagamento_analisi, analisi_generata, questionario_compilato)
root_cause_analysis.fix_required: Add Optional fields to UserResponse model and include them in login method response
